title: ctenopteris leucosora
intro: Ctenopteris leucosora, also known as New Zealand fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand, characterized by its distinctive white or silver-tinged fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Ctenopteris leucosora include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and supporting digestive health. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
